MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brian F. Connors, Esq., 415-896-6000, for plaintiff/moving party Pier 38 Maritime Recreation Center, Inc.
*Appearance counsel for moving party. No argument and no opposition filed. The Court grants PLAINTIFF PIER 38 MARITIME RECREATION CENTER, INC.'S Petition to confirm arbitration award as judgment. Order and Judgment signed in open court. CSR: JOE VICKSTEIN, #4780 (REQ/302/JU)
